sample_description:
- **Document Title, Author, Year, and Publication Details**: 
  - Title: Not explicitly stated on the page.
  - Author: James I. Bryant
  - Year and Publication Details: Not explicitly stated on the page.

- **Sample Description and Experimental Conditions**: 
  - Samples: Sodium azide single crystals.
  - Conditions: Crystals were measured with the (111) direction either parallel or perpendicular to the incident spectrometer beam. Measurements were taken at 298°K and 90°K.

- **Spectroscopic Te
overall_findings:
hotometer.
  - The exciting radiation was a 4358-Å mercury line.
  - Spectra were measured with the sample mounted in a solid sample holder with the crystal's flat faces perpendicular to the axis of the Toronto arc.

- **Overall Findings or Conclusions from the Page**: 
  - The Raman frequencies are reported with an accuracy of ±1 cm⁻¹.
  - The document provides spectra for sodium azide single crystals in different orientations and temperatures, highlighting the differences in spectral features.
